calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-11-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos and Mars Goodman, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Petitioner and mother of minor, Jennifer Whittaker Morales present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined.
Proof of Publication on file.
Consent form from other parent on file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of mother Jennifer Whittaker Morales, aka Jennifer Whittaker Barcia to Jennifer Whittaker Barcia.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from Erenia Leetz Morales Barcia to Erenia Leetz Whittaker Barcia.
Decree Changing Names signed in open court.
